principal.label: Principal & Founder
principal.title: Preserving Sacred Knowledge, Shaping Future Leaders
principal.desc1: Jamia Islamabad is a beacon of Islamic learning, established to nurture scholarly intelligence alongside practical modern competencies. Our curriculum provides a solid foundation in the Islamic sciences (Hadith, Tafseer, Fiqh, Arabic Calligraphy) coupled with formal board education.
principal.desc2: Through this Education Management System, we streamline our admissions, academic performance, and student tracking, moving towards a modern digital workspace while remaining grounded in our fundamental values.

testimonials.title: Student & Parent Success
testimonials.subtitle: Testimonials
testimonials.t1: The dual pathway matric system at Jamia Islamabad let my son continue Quranic specialization without putting his school certifications on hold. Highly recommended for parents who want both education tracks.
testimonials.t2: Under Mufti Zafar Iqbal's guidance, study circles are deep, rigorous, and inspiring. Classical grammar and Arabic syntax are taught at a very high standard, helping me gain solid command.
testimonials.t3: The environment at Jamia is extremely respectful and focused. Tutors push students to exhibit excellence in daily character traits. It is much more than simple academics, it is tarbiyah.

cta.title: Admissions are Open for Academic Session {year}
cta.desc: Secure your seat today by filling out our digital admission application. Print it out and submit it physically to the administrator to initialize your academic records.

hero.subtitle: Jamia Islamabad
hero.title: Empowering Minds, Nurturing Souls
hero.description: Where classical Islamic theological studies blend seamlessly with modern secondary education, fostering ethical leadership and academic brilliance under the guidance of Dr. Mufti Muhammad Zafar Iqbal Jalali.

programs.title: Our Academic Programs
programs.subtitle: Explore the diverse courses offered at Jamia Islamabad

dars.title: Dars-e-Nizami (Islamic Theology)
dars.desc: A comprehensive 8-year course covering classical Arabic grammar, Fiqh, Tafseer, and Hadith literature.

hifz.title: Hifz-ul-Quran (Memorization)
hifz.desc: A structured memorization curriculum taught by experienced Qaris with focus on revision and correct Tajweed.

tajweed.title: Tajweed & Qira'at
tajweed.desc: Specialized certification in the classical rules of Quranic recitation and reading methodologies.

matricFa.title: Matric / F.A. (High School)
matricFa.desc: Board-affiliated science and arts education running concurrently with secondary Islamic theological courses.

process.title: Admission Process
process.subtitle: Complete your registration in three simple steps

step1.title: Fill Online Form
step1.desc: Input your personal, educational, and guardian details on the digital form and submit.

step2.title: Print & Sign Form
step2.desc: Download the generated PDF replica, print it on A4, and secure student and guardian signatures.

step3.title: Submit & Interview
step3.desc: Bring the signed form along with educational documents to the admin office for verification.
